verdict: Lean towards chalk. Ohtani elite, Yankees roll. Cubs clean fade of Reds. Braves play uptempo.
note: Ohtani 0.60 ERA is elite SP. Yankees strong at home. Cubs have Taillon edge. Cardinals have Pallante + power vs weak Sproat. Braves better team.

games.analysis: Elite vs weak SP. Yankees home park inflates runs but deGrom elite. Rodriguez terrible. Pitching matchup huge. Yanks roll but deGrom whiffs.
games.edge1: deGrom elite command suppresses Yanks wRC+. Elite K rate.
games.risk1: Yankees 5.49 rpg vs Rangers 3.74. Huge run diff favors home.

games.analysis: Ohtani 0.60 ERA elite. Lambert mediocre. Dodgers elite offense. Houston bullpen pen ERA 6.31 (FADE). Ohtani dominates whole game.
games.edge1: Ohtani 0.60 ERA is historic. Best SP this year. 5 starts 0 damage.
games.risk1: HOU pen 6.31 ERA but Ohtani exits after 7. No relief needed.

games.analysis: Abbott 1.67 WHIP vs Cubs elite plate discipline (161 walks). Taillon 1.15 WHIP better command. Cubs 6-game win streak. Reds bullpen trap (4.89 xFIP). Cubs clean.
games.edge1: Abbott 1.67 WHIP vs Cubs 0.352 OBP. Traffic beats power here.
games.risk1: Taillon 2.34 HR/9 (high). Reds power could score.

games.analysis: Sproat 0-2, 6.75 ERA. Pallante 3-2, 3.73 ERA. Cardinals have power (44 HR, 0.404 SLG). Brewers missing Yelich. Cardinals at home. Pick em odds too cheap.
games.edge1: Sproat 1.61 WHIP vs Cardinals power gap. 7 HR allowed in 26 IP.
games.risk1: Brewers pen 3.67 ERA (best). If Sproat exits early, pen takes over.

games.analysis: Braves 25-11 best record. Elder 1.88 ERA elite. Mariners home fav but Braves offensive depth (4 solo HR last game). Seattle missing Raleigh (day-to-day).
games.edge1: Elder 1.88 ERA top tier. 3-1 record. Braves power profile elite.
games.risk1: Kirby 3.00 ERA solid. Mariners bullpen trending well. Home field matters.

locks: LAD (-239) vs HOU: Ohtani 0.60 ERA is historic. HOU bullpen 6.31 ERA fade. Score 92.
STL (-110) vs MIL: Sproat 6.75 ERA vs Pallante 3.73 ERA. Cardinals power vs weak pitcher. Score 71.
coinflips: TEX (+100) vs NYY: deGrom elite but Yankees roll at home. Run diff +1.75 huge but Yanks bullpen solid. Score 58.
ATL (+110) vs SEA: Braves best record, Elder 1.88 ERA elite. Kirby solid. Mariners home. Score 60.
passes: CIN at CHC: Tempting Cubs but CIN pen xFIP 4.89 trap. Avoid heavy favorites.
Other afternoon games: Limited data. Avoid early window.
session_note: Elite SP slate led by Ohtani 0.60 ERA. Avoid HOU fade (pen 6.31). CIN bullpen xFIP 4.89 trap. Play Cubs/Cardinals as 2-team. Skip Yankees (chalk). Braves uptempo but SEA home. Never lay heavy chalk.
